title: Robot girlfriends, recursive AI agents, full AI research, Happy Horse: AI NEWS
summary: This AI news roundup covers multiple recent releases and updates including OmniShotCut for video editing, Happy Horse robot platform, Mocap Anything v2 for motion capture, Ling 2.6 Flash language model, Vista4D for 3D generation, Talkie multimodal model, Grok 4.3, SenseNova U1, Nemotron 3 Nano Omni, and Mistral 3.5. The video discusses recursive multi-agent architectures, 3D agents, and various AI-driven applications across robotics, video, and language domains.
